text:
Created attachment 210839
py-junos-eznc-2.3.1

update net-mgmt/py-junos-eznc to 2.3.1

ChangeLog:
https://github.com/Juniper/py-junos-eznc/releases/tag/2.3.1
Bugfixes:
- Handled a check for pending Junos OS or package installation
- Fixed MetaPathLoader support only for jnpr.junos* modules
- Fixed huge tree XML support
- Fixed Junos sax parser issue for filter_xml broken

 
QA: poudriere testpor with all flavours on 11.3, 12.0, 12.1
